summary: Added a reproducible Devpilot demo runbook and a Playwright browser UI E2E script. The E2E passed against real Next pages with mocked API fixtures for resource sync, execution governance/task-pull readiness, logs, and monitoring.
remaining_risks: Live fake-target deploy -> completed -> rollback remains unproven in this run because the current 3100/3101 listeners are twgg containers, not Devpilot API/Web.
Browser UI E2E uses mocked API fixtures; it proves page/component/click coverage and i18n hygiene, not live DB/task-pull mutation.
next: S005 should start a clean Devpilot API/Web stack on non-conflicting ports, seed a disposable target from docs/devpilot/demo-runbook.md, then execute live deploy -> completed -> rollback.
